package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for raw_db_error_exposed_to_client: Direct serialization of SQL or GORM error text into API responses.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule117NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule117NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule117NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario117Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule117NegativeService, input Rule117NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
